A

addEdge(Node) - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Appends n to the list of outgoing edges.
addPublisher(Agent) - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Registers an agent as a publisher of this topic.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in interface project_biu.server.HTTPServer
Register s to handle requests whose verb is httpCommanmd and whose URI starts with uri.
addServlet(String, String, Servlet) - Method in class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
 
Agent - Interface in project_biu.graph
A software agent that reacts to messages published on Topics.
asDouble - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Message
Numeric view of the payload (Double.NaN when not a number).
asText - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Message
Textual view of the payload.

B

BinOpAgent - Class in project_biu.configs
An agent that performs a binary operation over two input topics and publishes the result to one output topic.
BinOpAgent(String, String, String, String, BinaryOperator<Double>) - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
Wires the agent into its two input topics and one output topic.

C

callback(String, Message) - Method in class project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
 
callback(String, Message) - Method in class project_biu.configs.IncAgent
 
callback(String, Message) - Method in class project_biu.configs.PlusAgent
 
callback(String, Message) - Method in interface project_biu.graph.Agent
Invoked when a Message is published to a topic this agent subscribed to.
callback(String, Message) - Method in class project_biu.graph.ParallelAgent
 
clear() - Method in class project_biu.graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Drops every topic.
clearLastMessage() - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Forgets the most recently published message so Topic.getLastMessage() reverts to null.
close() - Method in class project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
 
close() - Method in interface project_biu.configs.Config
Dispose of every agent created by Config.create().
close() - Method in class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.configs.IncAgent
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.configs.MathExampleConfig
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.configs.PlusAgent
 
close() - Method in interface project_biu.graph.Agent
Releases resources held by the agent.
close() - Method in class project_biu.graph.ParallelAgent
 
close() - Method in interface project_biu.server.HTTPServer
Stop the accept loop, shut down workers, and close every registered servlet.
close() - Method in class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.servlets.ConfLoader
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.servlets.HtmlLoader
 
close() - Method in interface project_biu.servlets.Servlet
Release any resources the servlet is holding.
close() - Method in class project_biu.servlets.TopicDisplayer
 
close() - Method in class project_biu.servlets.TopicReset
 
Config - Interface in project_biu.configs
A bundle that knows how to instantiate a particular set of agents and topic subscriptions, i.e.
ConfLoader - Class in project_biu.servlets
Servlet bound to POST /upload.
ConfLoader() - Constructor for class project_biu.servlets.ConfLoader
Constructs a new ConfLoader with no currently-loaded config.
create() - Method in interface project_biu.configs.Config
Build the agents and subscriptions that this config represents.
create() - Method in class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
 
create() - Method in class project_biu.configs.MathExampleConfig
 
createFromTopics() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Graph
Populates the graph from the TopicManager's current registry.

D

data - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Message
Raw byte payload.
date - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Message
Creation timestamp.

G

GenericConfig - Class in project_biu.configs
Reads a text-based description of a publish/subscribe topology and instantiates every agent it describes, wrapped in ParallelAgent.
GenericConfig() - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
Constructs an empty GenericConfig; call GenericConfig.setConfFile(String) before GenericConfig.create().
get() - Static method in class project_biu.graph.TopicManagerSingleton
Entry point for clients.
getContent() - Method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the raw request body bytes.
getEdges() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Returns the outgoing edges.
getGraphHTML(Graph) - Static method in class project_biu.views.HtmlGraphWriter
Returns the HTML for visualising g, line-by-line so callers can stream the result to an OutputStream.
getHttpCommand() - Method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the HTTP verb.
getLastMessage() - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Latest message published through this topic, or null if none yet.
getMsg() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Returns the message attached to this node.
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
 
getName() - Method in interface project_biu.configs.Config
Human-readable name for the config.
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
 
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.IncAgent
 
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.MathExampleConfig
 
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Returns this node's name.
getName() - Method in class project_biu.configs.PlusAgent
 
getName() - Method in interface project_biu.graph.Agent
Returns the agent's display name.
getName() - Method in class project_biu.graph.ParallelAgent
 
getParameters() - Method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the merged parameter map.
getTopic(String) - Method in class project_biu.graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Returns the topic with the given name, creating it on first lookup.
getTopics() - Method in class project_biu.graph.TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager
Read-only view of every topic currently registered.
getUri() - Method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the full request URI.
getUriSegments() - Method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Returns the URI path segments.
getVersion() - Method in interface project_biu.configs.Config
Version stamp (useful when a config evolves over time).
getVersion() - Method in class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
 
getVersion() - Method in class project_biu.configs.MathExampleConfig
 
Graph - Class in project_biu.configs
The directed graph that mirrors a publish/subscribe topology.
Graph() - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.Graph
Constructs an empty Graph; populate it via Graph.createFromTopics().

H

handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class project_biu.servlets.ConfLoader
 
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class project_biu.servlets.HtmlLoader
 
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in interface project_biu.servlets.Servlet
Process a parsed request and write the full HTTP response (status line, headers, blank line, body) to toClient.
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class project_biu.servlets.TopicDisplayer
 
handle(RequestParser.RequestInfo, OutputStream) - Method in class project_biu.servlets.TopicReset
 
hasCycles() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Graph
Returns true if any node belongs to a strongly-connected component that contains a cycle.
hasCycles() - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Returns true if the subgraph reachable from this node contains a directed cycle.
HtmlGraphWriter - Class in project_biu.views
Generates the browser-facing HTML view for a Graph.
HtmlLoader - Class in project_biu.servlets
Serves static HTML files out of a configured directory in response to any GET /app/... request.
HtmlLoader(String) - Constructor for class project_biu.servlets.HtmlLoader
Constructs a loader that serves static files out of htmlDir.
HTTPServer - Interface in project_biu.server
Generic HTTP server abstraction.

I

IncAgent - Class in project_biu.configs
Single-input increment agent used by GenericConfig.
IncAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.IncAgent
Reflective constructor used by GenericConfig.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class project_biu.Main
Boots the HTTP server, registers servlets, and waits for stdin to shut down.
Main - Class in project_biu
Entry point of the Advanced Programming project.
Main() - Constructor for class project_biu.Main
Utility class; not meant to be instantiated.
MathExampleConfig - Class in project_biu.configs
The (a+b) * (a-b) sample computational graph from the Exercise 3 PDF.
MathExampleConfig() - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.MathExampleConfig
Constructs a new MathExampleConfig.
Message - Class in project_biu.graph
An immutable carrier of information that flows through the publish/subscribe graph.
Message(byte[]) - Constructor for class project_biu.graph.Message
Convenience constructor that decodes the bytes using the JVM default charset.
Message(double) - Constructor for class project_biu.graph.Message
Convenience constructor that stores a number as its textual form.
Message(String) - Constructor for class project_biu.graph.Message
Canonical constructor.
MyHTTPServer - Class in project_biu.server
A minimal homemade HTTP server.
MyHTTPServer(int, int) - Constructor for class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
Constructs the server; call MyHTTPServer.start() to begin accepting connections.

N

name - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Topic
The topic's name (its unique identifier across the system).
Node - Class in project_biu.configs
Vertex in a directed graph that represents the runtime topology of a publish/subscribe computational graph.
Node(String) - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.Node
Constructs a node with the given name and no outgoing edges.

P

ParallelAgent - Class in project_biu.graph
Active Object decorator for Agent.
ParallelAgent(Agent, int) - Constructor for class project_biu.graph.ParallelAgent
Wraps agent behind a queue of at most capacity pending callbacks.
parseRequest(BufferedReader) - Static method in class project_biu.server.RequestParser
Parses a single HTTP request off the given reader.
PlusAgent - Class in project_biu.configs
Two-input addition agent used by GenericConfig.
PlusAgent(String[], String[]) - Constructor for class project_biu.configs.PlusAgent
Reflective constructor used by GenericConfig.
project_biu - package project_biu
 
project_biu.configs - package project_biu.configs
 
project_biu.graph - package project_biu.graph
 
project_biu.server - package project_biu.server
 
project_biu.servlets - package project_biu.servlets
 
project_biu.views - package project_biu.views
 
publish(Message) - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Broadcasts a message to every subscriber.
pubs - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Agents that may publish to this topic.

R

removePublisher(Agent) - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Unregisters a publisher agent.
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in interface project_biu.server.HTTPServer
Unregister whatever servlet is currently mapped at this (verb, URI).
removeServlet(String, String) - Method in class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
 
RequestInfo(String, String, String[], Map<String, String>, byte[]) - Constructor for class project_biu.server.RequestParser.RequestInfo
Constructs a RequestInfo from already-parsed pieces.
RequestParser - Class in project_biu.server
Parses a simplified HTTP/1.1 request out of a BufferedReader into a RequestParser.RequestInfo value object.
RequestParser() - Constructor for class project_biu.server.RequestParser
Utility class; not meant to be instantiated.
RequestParser.RequestInfo - Class in project_biu.server
Immutable bag of fields produced by RequestParser.parseRequest(BufferedReader).
reset() - Method in class project_biu.configs.BinOpAgent
 
reset() - Method in class project_biu.configs.IncAgent
 
reset() - Method in class project_biu.configs.PlusAgent
 
reset() - Method in interface project_biu.graph.Agent
Resets the agent's internal state.
reset() - Method in class project_biu.graph.ParallelAgent
 
run() - Method in class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
The accept loop.

S

Servlet - Interface in project_biu.servlets
Pluggable HTTP request handler.
setConfFile(String) - Method in class project_biu.configs.GenericConfig
Sets the path of the configuration file to load.
setEdges(List<Node>) - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Replaces the outgoing edges list.
setMsg(Message) - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Attaches a message to this node.
setName(String) - Method in class project_biu.configs.Node
Updates this node's name.
start() - Method in interface project_biu.server.HTTPServer
Start the accept loop in the background.
start() - Method in class project_biu.server.MyHTTPServer
Overridden so callers can safely connect to the server the instant start() returns.
subs - Variable in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Agents that subscribed to this topic.
subscribe(Agent) - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Adds an agent as a subscriber.

T

Topic - Class in project_biu.graph
A named broadcast channel that agents can subscribe to or publish through.
TopicDisplayer - Class in project_biu.servlets
Servlet bound to GET /publish.
TopicDisplayer() - Constructor for class project_biu.servlets.TopicDisplayer
Constructs a new TopicDisplayer.
TopicManagerSingleton - Class in project_biu.graph
The single registry of every Topic in the system.
TopicManagerSingleton() - Constructor for class project_biu.graph.TopicManagerSingleton
Utility holder class; not meant to be instantiated.
TopicManagerSingleton.TopicManager - Class in project_biu.graph
The actual manager.
TopicReset - Class in project_biu.servlets
Servlet bound to GET /reset.
TopicReset() - Constructor for class project_biu.servlets.TopicReset
Constructs a new TopicReset.

U

unsubscribe(Agent) - Method in class project_biu.graph.Topic
Removes an agent from subscribers.
